default.headline: Localization AI+™
default.chatGreeting: Welcome to Brian & Co. I can adapt language, tone, accessibility, and regional guidance for you.
default.conciergePrompt: Tell me your preferred language, region, accessibility needs, and role so I can personalize your experience.
default.accessibilityPrompt: Accessibility options are always available and may be adapted to your language and region.
default.regionNotice: Regional content is personalized only where appropriate and consent-aware.

en-US.headline: Localization AI+™
en-US.chatGreeting: Welcome to Brian & Co. I can personalize your experience by region, language, accessibility preference, and role.

en-GB.headline: Localization AI+™
en-GB.chatGreeting: Welcome to Brian & Co. I can adapt language, tone, accessibility, and regional guidance for your location.

en-CA.headline: Localization AI+™
en-CA.chatGreeting: Welcome to Brian & Co. I can adapt your experience for Canadian regional context and language preferences.

fr-CA.headline: Localization AI+™
fr-CA.chatGreeting: Bienvenue chez Brian & Co. Je peux adapter la langue, le ton, l’accessibilité et l’expérience régionale.

fr-FR.headline: Localization AI+™
fr-FR.chatGreeting: Bienvenue chez Brian & Co. Je peux adapter votre expérience selon votre langue, votre région et vos besoins d’accessibilité.

es-US.headline: Localization AI+™
es-US.chatGreeting: Bienvenido a Brian & Co. Puedo adaptar el idioma, el tono, la accesibilidad y la experiencia regional.

es-MX.headline: Localization AI+™
es-MX.chatGreeting: Bienvenido a Brian & Co. Puedo adaptar tu experiencia por idioma, región, accesibilidad y preferencias.

de-DE.headline: Localization AI+™
de-DE.chatGreeting: Willkommen bei Brian & Co. Ich kann Sprache, Ton, Barrierefreiheit und regionale Hinweise anpassen.

it-IT.headline: Localization AI+™
it-IT.chatGreeting: Benvenuto in Brian & Co. Posso adattare lingua, tono, accessibilità e guida regionale.

pt-BR.headline: Localization AI+™
pt-BR.chatGreeting: Bem-vindo à Brian & Co. Posso adaptar idioma, tom, acessibilidade e orientação regional.

ja-JP.headline: Localization AI+™
ja-JP.subheadline: 地域・方言インテリジェンス
ja-JP.chatGreeting: Brian & Coへようこそ。言語、地域、アクセシビリティ、役割に合わせて体験を調整できます。

ko-KR.headline: Localization AI+™
ko-KR.chatGreeting: Brian & Co에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 언어, 지역, 접근성, 역할에 맞게 경험을 조정할 수 있습니다.

zh-CN.headline: Localization AI+™
zh-CN.chatGreeting: 欢迎来到 Brian & Co。我可以根据语言、地区、无障碍需求和角色调整体验。

ar.headline: Localization AI+™
ar.chatGreeting: مرحباً بك في Brian & Co. يمكنني تكييف اللغة والنبرة وإمكانية الوصول والإرشاد الإقليمي.
